properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Look at all the signs Look at the shows All the glamorous people That claim to know What perfection is And what makes beauty stay But when all the styles go out And the labels fade away

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's what you give that makes you beautiful It's how you live that makes your dreams come true Keep your faith in His Word; let the light of the Lord shine through That's what makes you beautiful

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Nothing burns as bright Nothing shimmers so As the smile of a friend When hope is running low And how your hand feels warm When you dry a tear Love is still in fashion At the end of every year

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Even roses fade away in the snow But the beauty of the Lord can only grow
